sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7196" key="a)napi/esma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνα-πίεσμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n7196.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trap-door</tr_> on the stage, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:127" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.127</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">132</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
